programme.title: Chocolat
programme.desc: A woman opens a chocolate shop in a French town and creates confections that inspire the straitlaced villagers to abandon themselves to temptation and happiness.

programme.title: Hard Times: Lost On Long Island
programme.desc: Featuring Long Islanders who lost their jobs in the Great Recession, this documentary looks at the realities of long-term, white-collar unemployment in America.

programme.title: Life, Larry And The Pursuit Of Unhappiness S1
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama wanted to honor America's 250th anniversary...but then Larry David called.

programme.title: Splitsville
programme.desc: Carey seeks support after divorce, but learns Julie and Paul's secret: an open marriage. Crossing the line throws all their lives into turmoil.

programme.title: The Commandant's Shadow
programme.desc: This film follows Hans Jürgen Höss, the 87-year-old son of Auschwitz Commandant Rudolf Höss, as he faces his father’s terrible legacy.

programme.title: Nothing Left Unsaid: Gloria Vanderbilt & Anderson Cooper
programme.desc: Gloria Vanderbilt and her son take a candid look back on Vanderbilt's life as an artist, entrepreneur and celebrity who has spent over 90 years in the public eye.

programme.title: Imagine That
programme.desc: When a successful executive suffers a crisis of confidence and his career is at stake, he finds the solution to his problems in his daughter’s imaginary world.

programme.title: A Choice Of Weapons: Inspired By Gordon Parks
programme.desc: Celebrating the legacy of trailblazing photographer Gordon Parks through the lens of contemporary artists influenced by his work.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: An intelligence agent is suspected of betraying the nation, forcing her agent husband to choose between loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: An emotionally charged action thriller of a commercial diver who after a freak accident is trapped on the bottom of the North Sea.

programme.title: House Of The Dragon S3
programme.desc: Based on George R.R. Martin’s “Fire & Blood,” the series, set 200 years before the events of “Game of Thrones,” tells the story of House Targaryen.

programme.title: God Is The Bigger Elvis
programme.desc: An Oscar®-nominated documentary about a promising young actress who left Hollywood to become a nun.

programme.title: Shoot 'Em Up

programme.title: Liberty: Mother Of Exiles

programme.title: Final Destination 2
programme.desc: A group of friends on holiday finds that no matter how hard they try, they can't cheat Death twice.

programme.desc: A HBO Original Movie about how a simple immigration issue spins wildly out of control for those involved, ranging from the US President to a news producer.

programme.title: Heir To An Execution: A Granddaughter’S Story

programme.title: Life, Larry And The Pursuit Of Unhappiness S1
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama wanted to honor America's 250th anniversary...but then Larry David called.

programme.title: Regretting You

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Faced with an impending threat unlike others, Hiccup and Toothless battle to protect all that they love with a female Light Fury as they travel to a mythical hidden world.

programme.title: Elvis

programme.desc: When things are no longer what they used to be, a former prom queen and her friend realise that it is time for them to grow up.

programme.desc: Faced with an impending threat unlike others, Hiccup and Toothless battle to protect all that they love with a female Light Fury as they travel to a mythical hidden world.

programme.title: Young Adult
programme.desc: When things are no longer what they used to be, a former prom queen and her friend realise that it is time for them to grow up.

programme.title: War Dogs

programme.title: Five Nights At Freddy's 2
programme.desc: After shattering the box office with a global gross of $292M and becoming Blumhouse's highest-grossing film ever, Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria is reopening its doors. Director Emma Tammi returns to helm the eagerly anticipated sequel, promising a chilling new chapter with a bone-chilling warning: Anyone can survive five nights, this time, there will be no second chances…

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: A clerk with no future finds his world tossed upside down after he joins a secret group of assassins when he discovers he has special powers.

programme.title: Novocaine
programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams is taken hostage, Nathan turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected strength in the fight to get her back.

programme.title: Tad, the Lost Explorer, and the Secret of King Midas
programme.desc: Tad travels to Las Vegas to see his friend Sara’s latest discovery – a papyrus who turns everything he touches into gold.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set S1

programme.title: Elvis
programme.desc: The life and music of Elvis Presley, seen through the prism of his complicated relationship with his enigmatic manager, Colonel Tom Parker.

programme.title: Usury Academy
programme.desc: Kang-jin is bullied as the lowest-ranking boy at school with no presence and money. He starts a business on private loans by chance and soon rises to the top of the school hierarchy.

programme.title: The Magician
programme.desc: A talented young magician falls for a princess betrothed to his former teacher, leading to a fierce showdown between the two powerful magicians.

programme.title: The Sheriff in Town
programme.desc: When a former police investigator from Busan suspects something off about a slick businessman from Seoul, the “sheriff” resolves to track his every move in order to keep his town safe.

programme.title: Room No. 7
programme.desc: Doo-Sik tries to evade bankruptcy by selling his DVD screening business, but a crisis arises as he discovers a corpse and a stash of drugs that belongs to his employee in screening room number seven.

programme.title: Cheer Up, Mr. Lee!
programme.desc: Unlike his heart-throb appearances, Mr. Lee, who has very child-like characteristics, embarks on a voyage of discovery with his young daughter ‘Saet-byeol’ whom he has just met.

programme.title: Holy Night: Demon Hunters
programme.desc: Seoul falls into chaos as a devil-worshipping cult summons an ancient demon Asmodeus. “Holy Night”, the demon-hunting trio, unleash their power to battle against the cult enforcers and the demon in order to save a possessed girl from Asmodeus.

programme.title: Il Mare
programme.desc: A young woman from 1999 and a young man from 1997 begin a parallel-time love story separated by a span of two years when they start to receive each other's letters in the mailbox.

programme.title: You Will Die in 6 Hours

programme.desc: Autumn is on hold as summer continues, with unexpectedly balmy conditions throwing a life line to the roe deer as they prepare for the winter ahead. For other animals, mating season has arrived, making for a testosterone-fuelled time at Ravenscar Beach.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Despite its delayed arrival, for the Grey Seals at Ravenscar Beach winter means it is time to give birth. The newborn pups are now on the fast track to adulthood, with just three weeks to gain as much weight as possible before their mothers move on.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard meet Paige Bradley, a world-famous sculptor who destroyed her own art to create something new. Using fire and imagination, Paige offers insight into creativity and the artistic process.

programme.title: Visionaries ft. Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: Keanu and Gard meet Mattie Rodrigue, the lead scientific researcher on OceanX. Mattie and her team explore the unknown ocean, and their work reveals how nature inspires everything we do.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Living your life at night can present extreme challenges - and massive opportunities. In this world without light, danger lurks around every corner.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: When winter arrives, temperatures plummet and food becomes scarce. But some animals have evolved unique adaptations to flourish in the world’s most cold and barren landscapes.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Cheese Master Afrim Pristine begins his cheese expedition in the Alpine country of Switzerland, home of iconic classics like Gruyere and holey Swiss Emmental.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Eating cheese is a national pastime in France. Here, Afrim uncovers the rich histories of cheesemaking across the country from Paris to Normandy.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim takes in the cheesy traditions of la belle province, Quebec, where family fromageries’ traditions have been passed on through generations.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: In Vintage Week, our eight remaining amateur bakers step back in time to bake filled profiteroles, a tasty beef wellington, and create a classic checkerboard cake.

programme.title: Every Bite Takes You Home
programme.desc: Share in the journeys of 16 remarkable asylum seekers who have found a home in Australia. Each person's unique story, blended with the memories of their favourite recipes and traditions, reminds us that food can unite us all.

programme.title: Loving Gluten Free
programme.desc: Helen swaps out breadcrumbs for quinoa to make a favourite, crisby gluten free crumbed chicken. Helen then heads to 'Saba's Ethiopian Restaurant' in Fitzroy to learn about gluten free options in Ethiopian cooking.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Australia is a "hot spot" for deceitful animal behaviour but sometimes being deceptive isn't all about lying or cheating - it can assist in risk-taking and doing whatever it takes to get ahead in the wild.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Australian Story
programme.desc: When Louisa Ioannidis was found dead in a creek, police found no suspicious circumstances. But Louisa's brother had his doubts and with a private investigator has exposed serious flaws in the police case. (Part 1 of 2)

programme.title: Australian Story
programme.desc: The gripping conclusion in the mysterious case of Louisa Ioannidis, who was found dead in a creek in 2011. Intrigued by a podcast's revelations, a legal team has discovered new evidence and is pushing to re-open the case.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien
programme.desc: Lorna Dunkley brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: In Vintage Week, our eight remaining amateur bakers step back in time to bake filled profiteroles, a tasty beef wellington, and create a classic checkerboard cake.

programme.title: ABC National News
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Lorna Dunkley.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

Han Rourou, is the beauty of Huaxiang Street. She is every man's dream girl. Love abounds when these men and women cross paths.
